problem: Why is turbulent fluid flow mathematically unpredictable — Navier-Stokes unsolved
mechanism: Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue
hypothesis: Combining Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
